name: rezidans-fitness
description: Rezidans Fitness App — multi-tenant SaaS monorepo

scripts.build: npm run build -w @rezidans-fitness/shared && npm run build -w backend && npm run build -w web-admin
scripts.dev:mobile-ios: concurrently -n metro,ios -c yellow,cyan "npm run start -w mobile" "node scripts/wait-for-metro.mjs && npm run ios -w mobile -- --no-packager"
scripts.lint: npm run lint -w @rezidans-fitness/shared -w backend -w web-admin -w mobile --if-present
scripts.setup:local: npm run docker:up && node scripts/wait-for-pg.mjs && npm run migration:run -w backend && npm run db:seed
scripts.dev:app: concurrently -k -n backend,web -c blue,green "npm run start:dev -w backend" "npm run dev -w web-admin"
